emails.subject: SoCal's Window/OFO Meeting
emails.body: SoCal's Window/OFO Meeting Hi Jane: I'd planned to attend SoCal's meeting on Thursday, but it now appears I may have a conflict. Do you plan on attending? If so, could you gather up an additional set of anything they hand out for me? Given the controversy around SoCal's "windows," it will be interesting to see how this works out. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: SoCal's Window/OFO Meeting

emails.subject: RE: SoCal's Window/OFO Meeting
emails.body: RE: SoCal's Window/OFO Meeting I am planning to attend the meeting and will send you a copy of the hand-outs. I am sorry I will not get an opportunity to meet you. To: Tholt, Jane M.

emails.subject: RE: SoCal's Window/OFO Meeting

emails.subject: RE: SoCal's Window/OFO Meeting
emails.body: Thanks very much. I was looking forward to meeting you as well. I plan on coming to Houston soon, and I'll look you up when I'm there. Best, Jeff To: Dasovich, Jeff
